serviceNotes.engine oil: BMW CBS scheduled service. The B57 inline-6 diesel has a larger sump capacity than the B47 but follows the same CBS oil service regime. 30,000 km is the maximum distance between services.
serviceNotes.micro filter: BMW CBS scheduled service. The cabin micro filter traps pollen, dust and pollutants.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Brake fluid is hygroscopic and absorbs moisture over time, reducing its boiling point and braking effectiveness. Replacement is time-based, not distance-based — typically every 2 years regardless of mileage.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: BMW CBS scheduled service. Clean air is critical for the B57 twin-turbo diesel system. A dirty filter reduces performance and increases turbo wear.
serviceNotes.fuel filter: BMW CBS scheduled service. The fuel filter removes contaminants from diesel fuel before it reaches the high-pressure common-rail injectors, preventing damage to the fuel system.
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: BMW CBS wear-based reminder. The heavier 530d/540d with inline-6 increases front brake wear compared to 4-cylinder variants.
serviceNotes.check rear brake pads: BMW CBS wear-based reminder. Rear brake pads typically last longer than fronts but require periodic inspection.
serviceNotes.vehicle check: BMW CBS scheduled inspection. A comprehensive inspection covering braking systems, vehicle diagnostics, and technical components.
serviceNotes.ZF8 gearbox fluid: ZF recommends fluid replacement every 100,000 km despite BMW classifying it as a "lifetime fill." The higher torque output of the B57 makes fluid service especially beneficial.
serviceNotes.xDrive transfer case fluid: The xDrive transfer case distributes torque between front and rear axles. The B57's higher torque output accelerates fluid degradation. Applies to xDrive models only.
serviceNotes.differential fluids: Differential fluids lubricate the gears that transfer power to the wheels. The B57's torque demands make regular replacement important.
serviceNotes.timing chain: The B57 diesel timing chain is rear-mounted. While more reliable than the earlier N57, preventive replacement around 200,000 km avoids the risk of catastrophic engine failure from a stretched or broken chain. Chain stretch symptoms include rattling at cold start.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Engine coolant loses its anti-corrosion properties over time. A flush removes deposits and replenishes protection for the cooling system, water pump, and twin-turbo intercooler circuit.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct injection diesel engines accumulate carbon deposits on intake valves. The B57 twin-turbo setup can accelerate buildup. Walnut blasting or chemical cleaning restores performance.
